name: telehealth_queue
description: a telehealth visit queue routed by specialty; actions enqueue, route, complete

card.description: a telehealth visit queue routed by specialty; actions enqueue, route, complete

rules: A visit's lifecycle is waiting -> routed -> completed; it advances one stage per action.
enqueue adds a new visit to the waiting pool with an auto-assigned, monotonically increasing id.
Priority is an integer 1..5 (5 = most urgent), clamped into range; it defaults to 3.
route removes a visit from the waiting pool and appends it to the queue for its own specialty.
route and complete select the most urgent visit first, breaking ties by earliest arrival (lowest id).
complete removes the head of a specialty's provider queue and records it as completed.
num_waiting, num_routed, and num_completed always equal the sizes of their respective structures.
Actions with nothing to act on (e.g. route with an empty pool) leave the state unchanged.

emit.report: Telehealth queue: {num_waiting} waiting, {num_routed} routed to providers, {num_completed} completed.
